seoTitle: Lilydale vs Lima East — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lilydale and Lima East. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lilydale vs Lima East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lilydale and Lima East.
heading: Lilydale vs Lima East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lilydale, Victoria and Lima East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lilydale has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Lima East (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lilydale or Lima East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lilydale has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Lima East scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lilydale scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Lima East scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lilydale or Lima East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lilydale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
